title: Calling all Photographers
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The Rotary Club of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Rotary Club of Plettenberg Bay is thrilled to invite you to submit photographs for their annual fundraising calendar for 2026.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Rotary Club of Plettenberg Bay is thrilled to invite you to submit photographs for their annual fundraising calendar for 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All photographers, whether you are a professional, or passionate amateur, are welcome to submit their best photograph that captures the beauty, soul and vibrant culture of the iconic town of Plettenberg Bay.","html":"All photographers, whether you are a professional, or passionate amateur, are welcome to submit their best photograph that captures the beauty, soul and vibrant culture of the iconic town of Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The winner will select a charity of their choice to receive a R5000 donation from Rotary, as well as have their winning photograph on the cover of the calendar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The selected photo will be framed and presented to the winning photographer.","html":"The selected photo will be framed and presented to the winning photographer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Closing date for entries is 26 June 2025.","html":"Closing date for entries is 26 June 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please note that photos:","html":"Please note that photos:"},{"type":"list","items":["Should be at least 5000x3000 pixels (LANDSCAPE ONLY).","No Artificial Intelligence (AI).","No excessive use of Photoshop - auto correct and slight darkening only.","Shared via WETRANSFER or GOOGLE DRIVE links ONLY."],"ordered":true},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Email entries to: [email protected]","html":"Email entries to: [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
